description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black finish and a prominent pump-action fore-end. The stock is adjustable and ergonomic, with a pistol grip for enhanced control and comfort. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with visible rail mounts on top for accessory attachment. The fore-end has a ribbed texture for a secure grip, and the underbarrel area includes a tactical rail for mounting additional equipment. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Overall, the shotgun exudes a modern, utilitarian aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A tactical, matte black pump-action shotgun with an adjustable stock, pistol grip, and accessory rails, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, adjustable stock, pistol grip, and ribbed pump fore-end.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel opening, top rail, and the width of the fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, receiver, and pump with visible tactical rail underneath.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented rib and tactical rail on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth edges and ample space
